specific_question: Which online promotion caused the most website performance or server load issues in September 2025?
answer: Internal site performance logs show that the “Jocko's Pepper Hot Sauce Challenge” banner generated the highest number of server requests in September 2025, causing occasional slowdowns in Vermont and New Hampshire.
